creator: kungfujesus06@gmail.com
text: Expanding memory if viable is something I'd do anyway with 2GB.  You can probably shrink the ARC max to something pretty low, though.  I managed, once upon a time, to, on a Pentium III laptop, lower the ARC max to something small enough that it worked within 768MB of memory.  It's doable, at a penalty for those ARC misses.
